title: Cook a full meal from a recipe you've never tried before
flavour: you've been eating the same 4 meals. today is meal 5. make it count.

title: Repair something instead of throwing it away
flavour: broken ≠ trash. the skill of fixing things is disappearing. resist.

title: Build or assemble something with your hands
flavour: IKEA counts. Arduino counts. a birdhouse counts. make a physical thing.

title: Learn a basic chord on guitar, or a short melody on any instrument
flavour: music: the oldest skill. you don't have to be good. just start.

title: Redesign something — your desktop, your workspace, how you organize notes
flavour: your setup is a product of defaults. today you choose intentionally.

title: Write a short story — at least 300 words, any genre
flavour: character. conflict. resolution. you've read enough stories. write one.

title: Deep clean one room properly — not surface level, actually clean it
flavour: not the fake clean. the real clean. baseboards. behind things. under things.

title: Complete a tutorial on a skill you've been meaning to learn
flavour: it's been in your 'watch later'. today it gets watched and practiced.

title: Take 20 intentional photos — compose each one, don't just snap
flavour: your phone is a camera. you've been using it wrong. slow down. compose.

title: Budget your month — every income, every expense, actual numbers
flavour: the vibes-based budget isn't working. time for numbers. they're not scary.
